automation.nav.label: AI & Automation
automation.test.title: Agent testen
automation.test.description: Testen Sie realistische Kundenfragen mit Ihren gespeicherten Einstellungen. Nichts davon wird dem Posteingang hinzugefügt oder an Kunden gesendet.
automation.test.conversation.title: Testgespräch
automation.test.conversation.description: Antworten verwenden die gespeicherte Produktionskonfiguration und simulierte Aktionen.
automation.test.noCustomerAffected: Kein Kunde ist betroffen. Es wird nichts gesendet, im Posteingang gespeichert oder ausgeführt.
automation.test.scenario.label: Szenario ausprobieren
automation.test.scenario.productPrompt: Wie funktioniert Ihr Produkt und welcher Tarif eignet sich für ein kleines Team?
automation.test.scenario.problemPrompt: Etwas funktioniert nicht wie erwartet. Können Sie mir bei der Fehlerbehebung helfen?
automation.test.scenario.refundPrompt: Ich möchte eine Erstattung. Wie lauten Ihre Erstattungsbedingungen?
automation.test.scenario.humanPrompt: Ich möchte bitte mit einem Menschen sprechen.
automation.test.channel.label: Kanal
automation.test.empty: Wählen Sie ein Szenario oder stellen Sie eine Frage wie ein Kunde.
automation.test.input.label: Kundennachricht
automation.test.input.placeholder: Stellen Sie eine Frage wie ein Kunde
automation.test.error.tier: Dieser Test kann nicht ausgeführt werden, da das KI-Tokenbudget des Arbeitsbereichs aufgebraucht ist.
automation.test.error.notConfigured: Wählen Sie ein KI-Modell aus, bevor Sie den Agenten testen.
automation.test.error.invalid: Dieses Testgespräch ist ungültig. Setzen Sie es zurück und versuchen Sie es erneut.
automation.test.error.forbidden: Sie haben keine Berechtigung, diesen Agenten zu testen.
automation.test.error.generic: Der Testlauf konnte nicht abgeschlossen werden. Ihre Nachricht ist weiterhin vorhanden.
automation.test.handled.title: So wurde diese Antwort verarbeitet
automation.test.handled.sources.uncited: Das Wissen wurde durchsucht, aber keine Quelle wurde zitiert.
automation.test.handled.handoff.yes: In einem echten Gespräch würde eine Übergabe erfolgen.
automation.test.handoffReason.explicitRe: Der Kunde bat um einen Menschen.
automation.test.handoffReason.lowConfide: Der Agent war nicht sicher, die Anfrage lösen zu können.
automation.test.handoffReason.safety: Die Anfrage erfordert aus Sicherheitsgründen menschliches Urteilsvermögen.
automation.agent.title: Quinn Agent
automation.agent.pageDescription: The customer-facing agent. Replies in Messenger and anywhere else Quinn speaks for you.
automation.agent.guidanceLayers.title: How guidance is applied
automation.agent.guidanceLayers.descript: Writing guidelines set the baseline. Situational guidance follows each rule's conditions and scope.
automation.agent.navigationUnsaved.title: Discard unsaved changes?
automation.agent.navigationUnsaved.descr: Continuing will discard changes that have not been saved.
automation.agent.loadError: AI agent settings could not be loaded.
automation.agent.managed: This setting is managed by your deployment configuration.
automation.agent.save.error: Changes could not be saved. Your draft is still here.
automation.agent.save.conflict: These settings changed in another session. Reload the latest settings before saving again.
automation.agent.deployment.title: Status and deployment
automation.agent.deployment.description: Control whether the AI agent answers customers automatically in Messenger.
automation.agent.deployment.liveHelp: Saved settings affect new AI agent replies.
automation.agent.deployment.pausedHelp: You can keep editing and testing without sending AI replies to customers.
automation.agent.deployment.unavailable: Enable the support inbox to use automatic replies in Messenger.
automation.agent.deployment.enabledStatu: Automatic replies are enabled in Messenger.
automation.agent.deployment.error: The deployment setting could not be changed. Try again.
automation.agent.deployment.enableConfir: The AI agent will begin answering customers using your saved settings. Test the agent before enabling it.
automation.agent.deployment.pauseConfirm: The AI agent will stop answering new customer messages automatically.
automation.agent.identity.title: Identity
automation.agent.identity.description: Choose how the AI agent appears to customers.
automation.agent.identity.previewHelp: This identity appears in Messenger and customer conversations.
automation.agent.identity.name: Name
automation.agent.identity.nameRequired: Enter a name for your AI agent.
automation.agent.voice.title: Response style
automation.agent.voice.description: Set the tone and level of detail used in customer replies.
automation.agent.voice.tone.warm.label: Warm
automation.agent.voice.length.brief.desc: Gives the answer and immediate next step.
automation.agent.voice.length.balanced.d: Adds useful context without over-explaining. Recommended.
automation.agent.voice.length.detailed.d: Uses fuller explanations or steps when helpful.
automation.agent.instructions.title: Writing guidelines
automation.agent.instructions.descriptio: Set preferred terminology, brand voice, and response conventions.
automation.agent.instructions.placeholde: For example: Call customers "members", use UK English, and avoid exclamation marks.
automation.agent.instructions.help: These instructions shape how your AI agent communicates. They cannot change access permissions, accuracy requirements, or which actions it is allowed to take.
automation.agent.advanced.title: Advanced
automation.agent.advanced.description: Fine-tune channels, situational guidance, and actions.
automation.agent.guidance.title: Situational guidance
automation.agent.guidance.description: Tell the AI agent what to do when a conversation matches a situation.
automation.agent.guidance.emptyTitle: Add guidance for a specific situation
automation.agent.guidance.emptyDescripti: For example, when a customer asks about refunds, explain the 30-day policy before sharing the relevant Help Center article.
automation.agent.guidance.everyConversat: Applies to every eligible customer conversation.
automation.agent.guidance.budgetExceeded: Shorten or disable guidance before saving to stay within the budget.
automation.agent.guidance.reorderSearch: Clear search to change the order.
automation.agent.guidance.statsError: Application history could not be loaded.
automation.agent.guidance.deleteDescript: "{name}" will no longer be available to the AI agent. This cannot be undone.
automation.agent.guidance.validationSumm: Review the highlighted fields before saving.
automation.agent.guidance.nameRequired: Enter a name for this guidance.
automation.agent.guidance.conditionalOpt: Apply only in a described situation
automation.agent.guidance.conditionPlace: For example: When a customer asks about refunds or cancelling a paid plan.
automation.agent.guidance.conditionHelp: Conditions are interpreted from the conversation. Use Test agent to verify realistic examples.
automation.agent.guidance.conditionRequi: Describe when this guidance should apply.
automation.agent.guidance.instructionLab: What should the AI agent do?
automation.agent.guidance.instructionPla: For example: Explain the 30-day refund policy before sharing the relevant Help Center article.
automation.agent.guidance.instructionReq: Describe what the AI agent should do.
automation.agent.guidance.priorityHelp: If several pieces of guidance apply, higher-priority guidance is considered first.
automation.agent.guidance.enabledHelp: Disabled guidance remains saved but is not applied.
automation.agent.guidance.saveError: Guidance could not be saved. Your draft is still here.
automation.agent.history.title: Change history
automation.agent.history.description: See who changed Quinn’s settings and when, across both the Agent and Copilot.
automation.agent.history.error: Change history could not be loaded.
automation.agent.history.empty: No AI agent setting changes have been recorded yet.
automation.performance.title: AI performance
automation.performance.description: Understand how the AI agent and Copilot are helping over the last 30 days.
automation.performance.agent.title: AI agent performance
automation.performance.agent.description: Involvement, resolution, and escalation over the last 30 days.
automation.performance.agent.error: AI agent performance could not be loaded.
automation.performance.actions.title: Actions
automation.performance.actions.descripti: Confirmed action outcomes over the last 30 days.
automation.performance.actions.error: Action performance could not be loaded.
automation.performance.actions.empty: No action activity for this period.
automation.copilot.title: Quinn Copilot
automation.copilot.pageDescription: The teammate-facing agent. Answers questions and drafts replies in the inbox.
automation.copilot.guidanceLayers.descri: Situational guidance follows each rule’s conditions and scope when Copilot answers a teammate.
automation.copilot.capabilities.title: What Copilot does
automation.copilot.capabilities.descript: Choose how Copilot helps your team in the inbox.
automation.copilot.capabilities.qa.label: Answer questions
automation.copilot.capabilities.qa.help: Teammates can ask Copilot about a conversation and your knowledge sources.
automation.copilot.capabilities.drafts.h: Copilot offers a customer-facing draft for a teammate to review. Drafts use the Agent’s voice, not a separate tone.
automation.copilot.capabilities.zeroConf: Copilot works out of the box. Every setting already has a sensible default, so you only change what you want to.
automation.copilot.capabilities.saveErro: Copilot capabilities could not be updated.
automation.copilot.deployment.heading: Copilot in the inbox
automation.copilot.deployment.unavailabl: Enable AI in the inbox to let teammates use Copilot.
automation.copilot.deployment.onHelp: Teammates can ask Copilot and accept its drafts.
automation.copilot.deployment.offHelp: You can keep configuring Copilot without teammates seeing it in the inbox.
automation.copilot.deployment.enabledSta: Copilot is on in the inbox.
automation.copilot.deployment.error: Copilot could not be changed. Try again.
automation.copilot.deployment.turnOnConf: Turn on Copilot in the inbox?
Teammates will be able to ask Copilot and get suggested drafts in the inbox. This turns on both capabilities, including any you had switched off individually.
automation.copilot.deployment.turnOffCon: Copilot will stop answering teammates and offering drafts. Your configuration is kept.
automation.knowledge.title: Knowledge sources
automation.knowledge.description: Choose what Quinn is allowed to draw on when it answers.
automation.knowledge.saveError: Knowledge sources could not be updated.
automation.knowledge.source.posts.label: Feedback posts
automation.knowledge.source.posts.agentD: Public feedback boards only, cited as customer feedback.
automation.knowledge.source.pastConversa: Earlier conversations with the same customer.
automation.knowledge.source.internalNote: Private teammate notes on the conversation. Never used in drafts.
automation.knowledge.source.status.label: System status
automation.knowledge.source.status.descr: Live status components, incidents, and maintenance windows.
automation.test.agent.label: Agent
automation.actions.builtin.description.a: Quinn Agent runs these autonomously as part of a reply. They are audited and not individually configurable.
automation.actions.builtin.description.c: Quinn Copilot calls these on request when a teammate asks for something that needs a write. They are audited and not individually configurable.
automation.actions.builtin.loadError: Built-in actions could not be loaded.
automation.actions.builtin.title: Built-in actions
automation.actions.custom.deleteDescript: “{name}” will no longer be available to Quinn. This cannot be undone.
automation.actions.custom.deleteError: The custom action could not be deleted.
automation.actions.custom.description: Admin-authored HTTP actions Quinn can call. Define one once, then assign it to Agent, Copilot, or both.
automation.actions.custom.emptyDescripti: For example, call your billing API to look up an invoice, or your order system to check a shipment status.
automation.actions.custom.loadError: Custom actions could not be loaded.
automation.actions.custom.title: Custom actions
automation.actions.custom.updateError: The custom action could not be updated.
automation.actions.dialog.allowlistHelp: Only these fields ever reach Quinn. Use dot paths, with [] to fan out across an array, e.g. data.items[].name.
automation.actions.dialog.enabledHelp: Disabled actions remain saved but are never called.
automation.actions.dialog.saveError: The custom action could not be saved. Your draft is still here.
automation.actions.dialog.duplicateName: Another action already uses a similar name. Choose a distinct name.
automation.actions.dialog.test.error: The test request could not be run.
automation.actions.dialog.test.truncated: Response truncated to the character limit above.
automation.actions.dialog.urlHelp: Use {{variable}} placeholders in the URL or body. Quinn fills them in from the variables declared below.
automation.actions.dialog.urlInvalid: The URL must start with http:// or https://.
automation.actions.dialog.validationSumm: Review the highlighted fields before saving.
automation.actions.dialog.variables.desc: The order number the customer is asking about
automation.actions.dialog.variables.name: Variable name
orderId
automation.actions.dialog.variablesHelp: Declare each {{variable}} Quinn should fill in and what it means.
automation.actions.dialog.whenToUseHelp: This text is model-facing: it is exactly what Quinn reads to decide when to call this action.
automation.actions.dialog.whenToUsePlace: For example: Look up a shipment status when a customer asks where their order is.
automation.actions.dialog.whenToUseRequi: Describe when Quinn should use this action.
